proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or x1 - x0 + x0 = x1 }(k, n)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(n - k, k)
lib(nat.nat_combo).binom(k + (n - k), k) * k.factorial * (n - k).factorial != n.factorial
lib(nat.nat_combo).binom(k + (n - k), k) * k.factorial * (n - k).factorial = n.factorial
